subject: New Request: .NET Developer – E-commerce
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Shopgrid, a company in the e-commerce space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a .NET Developer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:
• .NET
• Azure
• Kubernetes
• DynamoDB

Practical details:
• Start: 2020-03-09
• Duration: 6 months
• Location: Malmö (on-site)
• Rate: up to 950 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Johan Bergström
Konsultchef
Konsult Partners
Tel: +46 76 456 78 90
